commands: python -m pytest workpacks/tools/tests/ -k "config or strict or fallback" -v
verification.regression_notes: Added config integration tests for lint/file validator (config found vs fallback, workpackDir resolution, strictMode defaulting, and output messaging).

handoff.summary: Config loader integrated into Python tools with backward-compatible defaults.

change_details: Added shared optional config loader/validator and standardized config detection messaging.
Integrated workpackDir/strictMode/protocolVersion behavior into lint and validate_workpack_files.
Integrated workpackDir resolution into scaffold template/meta/state paths.
Extended template validation to validate config schema and repository-level config when present.
